title: Homura Life Steal Enchantment
description: About the Enchantment of Life Steal enchantment
body:
This content was translated by AI.

Adds a Vampirism (Life Steal) enchantment to Minecraft.

Obtained via: Enchanting Table (Sword), Villager Trades, Fishing.

Effective on: Swords
Maximum Level: 1

Effect: When enchanted, attacking a target restores the user's health.
